pymthouse.description: Remote signer DMZ (Apache JWT + go-livepeer). Service name is pymthouse for historical reasons.

pymthouse-signer-test.description: Preview-only A/B remote signer DMZ. Do not deploy to production. Same webhook/OIDC/Kafka as pymthouse preview; LIVEPEER_IMAGE pins a different go-livepeer build. Entrypoint defaults BYOC_PER_CAP_PRICING=on for this service name.
